title: Notification No.78/2015-CUS(NT), dated 18.08.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 78 / 2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 18th August, 2015 S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Ahmedabad to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Additional or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-I, JNCH, Nhava Sheva; and (ii) the Additional or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Ahmedabad, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to (i) M/s Gocool Grinders, 30, Ghanshyam Industrial Estate, Near Margha Farm, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; (ii) M/s Gayatri Traders, 31/A,Ghanshyam Industrial Estate, Near Margha Farm, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; (iii) M/s Garvi Traders, 383, Mehta Tiles Compound, Opp: G. H. Board, Singarwa-Kathwada Road, Kathwada, Ahmedabad; (iv) M/s. Girnar Product, 30 Ghanshyam Industrial Estate, Near Margha Farm, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; (v) M/s Gangotri Industries, 30, Ghanshyam Industrial Estate, Near Margha Farm, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; (vi) M/s Ganga Products, 31-A, Ghanshyam Industrial Estate, Near Margha Farm, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; and others issued vide F.No. DRI/AZU/GI- 1/ENQ-71(INT-31/14)/2014/1744-1756, dated the 7th May, 2015 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/22/2015-Cus IV] (Anurag Sehgal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
